# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Discarded: this source should not enter the institute.

## Why

The excerpt is a conceptual blog essay about coding agents and software engineering practice, but it does not present experiments, benchmark tables, incident data, production telemetry, or field results. It argues from interpretation and framing rather than from a real evidence payload, so it fails the institute admission bar.

## Limits
